division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
chapter_title: Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title
text: Upon payment of appropriate fees, the license plate or decal and registration card issued pursuant to this article for the vehicle shall remain valid until the provisions of Section 5307 have been met.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 1. Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title [4000 - 5506]
#### Article 9.5. Registration of Fleet Vehicles [5301 - 5309]
##### § 5306

Upon payment of appropriate fees, the license plate or decal and registration card issued pursuant to this article for the vehicle shall remain valid until the provisions of Section 5307 have been met.

*(Repealed and added by Stats. 1982, Ch. 695, Sec. 2.)*

subsections.text: Upon payment of appropriate fees, the license plate or decal and registration card issued pursuant to this article for the vehicle shall remain valid until the provisions of Section 5307 have been met.
